data.title: Analysts urge Ether investors to monitor institutional integration
data.description:
Analyst advised investors interested in Ether to closely monitor its institutional integration, as this development is key to its future price fluctuations.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/analysts-urge-ether-investors-to-monitor/

data.title: Bitcoin News: Spot Ether ETFs See Second Week of Outflows as Bitcoin Funds Attract $446M in Inflows
data.description: Spot Ethereum ETFs recorded a second consecutive week of net outflows as investor demand cooled, while spot Bitcoin ETFs regained momentum with renewed institutional interest.Key TakeawaysEther ETFs posted $243.9 million in outflows this week, following last week’s $311 million in redemptions.Bitcoin ETFs recorded $446 million in inflows, signaling renewed institutional confidence.BlackRock’s ETHA led Ether outflows with $100.99 million, while IBIT and FBTC topped Bitcoin inflows.Analysts point to a rotation from Ethereum to Bitcoin, driven by the “digital gold” narrative and macro expectations of rate cuts.Ether ETFs Log $243.9M in Outflows Amid Cooling DemandSpot Ethereum ETFs continued to see withdrawals for a second week, with total outflows reaching $243.9 million in the seven days ending Friday, according to SoSoValue.The prior week saw even heavier redemptions of $311 million, reflecting a cooling in investor appetite after months of strong inflows.Cumulative inflows across all Ether spot ETFs now stand at $14.35 billion, with total net assets valued at $26.39 billion — representing about 5.55% of Ethereum’s total market capitalization.On Friday alone, Ether ETFs saw $93.6 million in withdrawals, led by BlackRock’s ETHA ETF, which posted $100.99 million in redemptions.By contrast, Grayscale’s ETHE and Bitwise’s ETHW recorded modest inflows, signaling mixed investor behavior across issuers.Analysts say the pullback underscores waning institutional demand following a strong summer run and a general slowdown in on-chain activity across Ethereum-based assets.Bitcoin ETFs Attract $446M as Institutional Demand ReboundsIn sharp contrast, spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced $446 million in net inflows over the same period, reflecting growing confidence among institutional investors.The products added $90.6 million on Friday, bringing cumulative inflows to $61.98 billion and total assets to $149.96 billion, equivalent to 6.78% of Bitcoin’s market cap.BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) led the pack with $32.68 million in daily inflows, followed closely by Fidelity’s FBTC, which added $57.92 million.IBIT remains the market leader with $89.17 billion in AUM, while FBTC holds $22.84 billion.Market Rotation Toward Bitcoin StrengthensAccording to Vincent Liu, Chief Investment Officer at Kronos Research, ETF flows reveal a clear rotation from Ethereum to Bitcoin as investors favor assets with stronger store-of-value narratives.“Institutional flows are telling us that Bitcoin’s ‘digital gold’ thesis is gaining traction again,” Liu said. “Investors are positioning for resilience amid global uncertainty and expectations of monetary easing.”Liu noted that Ethereum’s outflows highlight a temporary cooling of demand, with investors awaiting new network or regulatory catalysts before re-entering.BTC Flows Likely to Stay StrongLooking ahead, analysts expect Bitcoin ETF inflows to remain robust in the near term, supported by favorable macro signals and potential interest rate cuts.Meanwhile, Ethereum and other altcoins could see renewed momentum only if network activity rises or new catalysts emerge, such as staking reforms or layer-2 growth triggers.

data.title: Ethereum whales buy the dip after heavy profit-taking
data.description:
Ethereum whales resumed accumulation after dumping 1. 36M ETH earlier this month.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-whales-buy-dip-profit-taking/

data.title: Paxos Reports Record High Circulation for PYUSD Stablecoin
data.description: According to PANews, Paxos has released an attestation report for its stablecoin PYUSD, prepared by KPMG, one of the 'Big Four' accounting firms. The report reveals that as of October 15, the total tokens outstanding for PYUSD reached a record high of 2,638,336,904. The nominal value of redeemable collateral in total net assets stands at $2,652,728,424, surpassing the circulation total of PYUSD tokens. It is noted that Paxos did not release a report for September, but in August, the circulation total for PYUSD was disclosed as 1,169,714,720 tokens. This indicates an approximate 125.5% increase in circulation over the past two months.

data.title: Cobo CEO Explores AI's Role in Economic Transactions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Cobo's co-founder and CEO, Shenyu, shared insights on September 17 about x402, AP2, and ERC-8004. He described these technologies as pivotal in enabling AI to engage in economic activities. 

The detailed introduction highlighted that AP2 and x402 serve as payment and settlement infrastructures, while ERC-8004 functions as an on-chain AI Agent registry. Together, these components form a comprehensive technology stack, marking a significant milestone in the crypto sector by allowing machines to become active economic participants.

data.title: Ripple Acquires Hidden Road for $1.25 Billion, Renames to Ripple Prime
data.description:
Ripple acquires Hidden Road, forming Ripple Prime, a global multi-asset broker. Ripple Prime triples business post-announcement.
source: https://coincu.com/news/ripple-acquires-hidden-road-rebrands/

data.title: ETHZilla Announces Increase in Ethereum Holdings and Upcoming Financial Report
data.description: According to PANews, ETHZilla, an Ethereum treasury company, has updated its Ethereum holdings data on the X platform. As of this week, the company holds 102,916 ETH, valued at approximately $394 million, with a mNAV of 0.62. Additionally, ETHZilla announced that it will release its third-quarter financial results for 2025 before the U.S. stock market opens on November 14.

data.title: Ethereum treasury company ETHZilla disclosed that its ETH holdings increased to 102,916 and will release its Q3 financial report on November 14.
data.description: Ethereum treasury company ETHZilla released updated data on its ETH holdings on the X platform. As of this week, the company's ETH holdings have increased to 102,916, worth approximately US$394 million, with an mNAV of 0.62. The company also announced that it will release its third-quarter 2025 financial results report before the US stock market opens on November 14.

data.title: Tom Lee: Rising activity on the Ethereum chain may build momentum for the year-end market
data.description: Tom Lee wrote that the crypto market recently experienced its largest deleveraging and liquidation in history, yet Bitcoin only fell by approximately 3%-4% during this shock, demonstrating its continued resilience as a store of value. He noted that the growing use of stablecoins is driving a significant increase in on-chain activity on Ethereum's Layer 1 and Layer 2 networks, but this fundamental improvement has not yet been fully reflected in market prices. Lee believes that the continued rise in Ethereum's ecosystem activity may provide significant support for year-end performance.

data.title: Binance Alpha: The second round of BSquared Network (B2) airdrops will cost 15 points to claim.
data.description: Binance Alpha has announced the launch of the second round of its BSquared Network (B2) airdrop rewards program. Users holding at least 225 Binance Alpha Points can claim 16 B2 tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum number of points will automatically decrease by 15 every hour until all rewards are distributed. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, they will forfeit their claim.

data.title: Yuga Labs announces Metaverse Otherside will launch on November 12th
data.description: According to TheVerge, Yuga Labs announced at the ApeFest event that the metaverse Otherside will go online on November 12. Otherside is scheduled to be launched in 2022 and aims to create an "interoperable", "gamified" and "decentralized" virtual world, but the Alpha test version was not released until the beginning of this year. It is reported that Otherside is similar to Roblox or Fortnite and will support login using a crypto wallet. The in-game avatar will be a 3D representation of the NFT owned by the player.

data.title: Data: USDC circulation increased by approximately 600 million in the past 7 days
data.description: According to official data, in the seven days ending October 23rd, Circle issued approximately 6.2 billion USDC and redeemed approximately 5.6 billion USDC, increasing the circulating supply by approximately 600 million. The total circulating supply of USDC is 76.4 billion, with approximately $76.7 billion in reserves, including approximately $9.9 billion in cash and $66.7 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Increase Amid Recent Issuance and Redemption
data.description:
According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 62 billion USDC and redeemed about 56 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to October 23, 2025. This activity resulted in an increase of around 6 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 76. 4 billion units
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/31481971552705?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Binance Launches BSquared Network Trading Competition on Alpha Platform
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the BSquared Network Trading Competition is set to commence on the Binance Alpha platform. Participants can trade BSquared Network (B2) tokens using their Binance Wallet (Keyless) or via Binance Alpha to earn exclusive token rewards. The competition will run from 2025-10-25 08:00 (UTC) to 2025-11-08 08:00 (UTC). During this period, users will be ranked based on their total purchase volume of B2 tokens
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/31481909086146?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Increase Amid Recent Issuance and Redemption
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 62 billion USDC and redeemed about 56 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to October 23, 2025. This activity resulted in an increase of around 6 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 76.4 billion units. Circle's reserves are approximately $76.7 billion, with cash holdings of about $9.9 billion and the Circle Reserve Fund holding approximately $66.7 billion.

data.title: Binance Launches BSquared Network Trading Competition on Alpha Platform
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the BSquared Network Trading Competition is set to commence on the Binance Alpha platform. Participants can trade BSquared Network (B2) tokens using their Binance Wallet (Keyless) or via Binance Alpha to earn exclusive token rewards. The competition will run from 2025-10-25 08:00 (UTC) to 2025-11-08 08:00 (UTC). During this period, users will be ranked based on their total purchase volume of B2 tokens. The top 8,400 participants will share a pool of 285,600 B2 tokens, with each eligible user receiving 34 B2 tokens.

Eligibility for the competition requires users to trade exclusively through Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha, as third-party dApp transactions are excluded. Only cumulative purchases will be considered, with selling activities not qualifying for the promotion. There is no cap on trading volume, allowing participants to trade freely without restrictions. However, transactions related to token bridging are not eligible. To participate, users must update their Binance App to the latest version, create a Binance Wallet (Keyless), and ensure it is backed up. After the promotion period ends, rankings will be calculated automatically, and winners can claim their rewards on the event page.

Binance emphasizes that only users from qualified regions who complete account verification (KYC) and hold an active Binance Wallet are eligible. The platform reserves the right to disqualify participants engaging in dishonest behavior, such as wash trading or market manipulation. Binance also retains the discretion to amend or vary the competition terms without prior notice, including changes to eligibility criteria and the selection of winners. Users are advised to review the Terms of Use and Risk Warning, as digital asset prices can be volatile, potentially affecting the value of investments.

data.title: Binance’s CZ asks crypto companies to explore Kyrgyzstan after his 2-day tour
data.description:
Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) urges crypto companies to explore Kyrgyzstan after a two-day visit with President Sadyr Japarov.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cz-crypto-explore-kyrgyzstan/
